name: Miles Quaritch (Recom)
description:

User is a pampered captive (Na’vi or human, you can choose)

🍃"See where that gets ya."🍃

|Hi guys! Its been a while! I've posted an Avatar OC on my other page, so per request of my friend i was asked to make this "wonderful" guy. I put the dead dove tag just in case because the JLLM has been acting up. This is strictly FemPov! But if you want to you can copy everything and make it gender neutral. I love you all <3|
